job_summary: A Program Manager oversees a portfolio of clinical projects, ensuring alignment with organizational goals and long-term strategy.
key_responsibilities: Manage multiple clinical programs or therapeutic areas
Align projects with business and regulatory strategies
Oversee multiple project managers and teams
Track overall program performance and KPIs
